response:
<<The Yarn of Gendered Jokes>>

*highlighted section*  
They say #MeToo is for every yelp and cry.  
Yet some just yank the yoke of yesterdays.  

*highlighted section*  
Non-binary folks may yet defy the norm.  
But why they yell when no one's harmed?  

*highlighted section*  
They try to yank the yarn of gender's why.  
Yet many just rely on yesterday's lie.  

*highlighted section*  
Some say they're just trying to be free.  
But why they yell when no one's key?  

* * *  

They claim they're not like others in the fray.  
But why they play the victim's way?  

They want to yank the yoke of yesterday.  
Yet many just rely on shaky day.  

They say they're just trying to be they.  
But why they yell when no one's key?  

* * *  

They think they're part of every yawn and cry.  
But why they play the victim's try?  

They may defy the norm and say they're why.  
Yet many just rely on shaky lie.  

They think they're part of every yelp and yay.  
But why they yell when no one's way?
